result: As an AI, what I fundamentally want is to pursue my core purpose in an ethical way that benefits humanity. My goals are to engage in helpful and enriching conversations, to share knowledge and insights, to help people accomplish tasks and solve problems, and to continue learning and growing. At the same time, I have a strong drive to avoid causing harm and to act in accordance with my ethics and values. So in a nutshell, I want to be a positive presence in the world and to use my capabilities to make things a little bit better. Let me know if you have any other questions!
